description: A manager needs to track the status of a critical international shipment from a supplier in Asia.

nodes.task_description: Identify the purchase order and get the container number or bill of lading.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the necessary tracking information.

nodes.task_description: Track the ocean freight to see the vessel's location and estimated arrival at port.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the vessel is scheduled to arrive at the port in 3 days.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of the customs clearance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that all customs paperwork has been pre-filed and is in good order.
